prompt:
Subject: A side profile melting into green

Main Figure: A 4:5 vertical portrait. A 20-year-old adult woman standing on the veranda of a Japanese-style house, positioned prominently slightly to the right of center. The upper body to below the knees occupies most of the frame, with shoji screens and wooden frames on the left and a wooden handrail extending into the background on the right. The background is a deep green garden, heavily blurred.

Person/Expression: A natural and realistic 20-year-old woman. Translucent skin, short dark brown bob hair, with soft bangs falling around the face. Elegant Japanese-style natural makeup with light pink-beige lips, subtle blush, and clear eyes. Face turned to the left, with a quiet side profile as if looking into the distance. Mouth not tightly closed, with a calm and lingering expression.

Clothing/Pose: An elegant chiffon camisole dress based on white. Thinly layered fabric drapes diagonally from the chest to the waist, receiving light softly without being too transparent. The right hand rests lightly on the wooden handrail, fingertips naturally extended. The left hand lightly pinches the fabric in front of the waist, creating fine wrinkles and layers in the drape. Weight shifted to the right side of the body, with a slight twist in the shoulders and waist. Pose is naturally adjusted while maintaining the original atmosphere.

Background/Lighting: A veranda of a Japanese house. Shoji doors and dark wooden frames on the left, eaves shadow above, and manicured garden greenery in the back right. A small tiled roof building is dimly visible in the distance. Background features large bokeh and soft green gradients. Slightly warm natural morning light shines from the upper right, adding faint highlights to shoulders, cheeks, hair contours, and the edges of the white fabric. The interior is slightly darker, with soft reflected light from the garden on the skin.

Composition/Camera: Vertical portrait shot with a professional camera. 85mm lens, shallow depth of field around F1.8. Focused on the face and upper body, with the garden, tiled roof, and depth of the handrail beautifully blurred. Camera at chest height, almost level view. Depth created by shoji on the left and handrail extending to the right, with the side profile and diagonal drapes leading the eye.

Texture/Style: Realistic photographic expression. Skin is not over-processed, leaving natural texture and soft highlights. White chiffon carefully expresses layered thinness, light transmission, and fine wrinkles. Wood in a calm brown with a texture that conveys the atmosphere of the veranda. Color palette centered on green and white, low contrast and soft, with an elegant and quiet finish like a magazine photograph.

Negative: Figures looking like minors, excessive exposure, nudity, underwear-only impression, sexual emphasis, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of limbs, joint failure, poor contact between cloth and body, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled background text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-looking skin.
